title: xyris torta
intro: Xyris torta, also known as the torta yellow-eyed grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Xyridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Xyris torta include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Xyris torta can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
